name: Cutting Boards
description: Edge-grain, end-grain, and serving boards. The classic first project, and a lifetime of refinement after that.

name: Furniture
description: Tables, benches, bed frames, and casework for inside the house.

name: Storage & Shelving
description: Shelves, cabinets, boxes, and anything else that gets clutter off the floor.

name: Outdoor
description: Weather-exposed builds: planters, garden benches, sheds. Rot-resistant species and exterior hardware.

name: Shop Projects
description: Jigs, workbenches, and fixtures that make every project after them easier.

name: Gifts & Small Projects
description: Weekend builds from offcuts. Low cost, low commitment, high hit rate as gifts.
